address: 2025 J and C Blvd #5, Naples, FL 34109
pain_point: No website at all. Runs entirely on word-of-mouth and phone calls. 115 Google reviews at 4.9 stars proves demand — but zero online presence means missed leads when he's on a job site and can't answer. An AI receptionist would capture every call he misses.

notes: NO WEBSITE = highest pain. Family-operated. Sunbiz confirms Nixon D Lopez as owner. Located in J&C Blvd industrial corridor — start here, work south.
